notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Liam Hicks. Dylan Beavers to 3rd. Pete Alonso out at 2nd. Samuel Basallo out at 1st.
